name: Synup Social vs. Brandwatch
hero_summary: Ready for an upgrade? Let us introduce you to the perfect Brandwatch alternative. With all the insights, assistance, and more, Synup Social is your team’s new best friend. You’ll love the helpful tools, post optimization capabilities, and ingenious workflow-enhancing collaboration tools. Let’s take a look.
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_summary: Make data-driven decisions for unmatched growth. With Synup Social, you can power your social media strategy with revolutionary analytics. We’ll guide your posting strategy, so you can smash your engagement goals. Here’s how we do it:
section_2_slider_1_heading: Discover what makes your audience tick
section_2_slider_1_summary: Brandwatch’s analytics just don’t cut it. While extensive, the confusing interface makes it hard to determine your next steps. Clear the path forward with detailed, shareable analytics on a post-by-post basis from Synup Social. You need revolutionary analytics to power great content creation!
section_2_slider_2_summary: Brandwatch helps you plan - but it’s seriously lacking when it comes to content creation. Synup Social makes you more effective, inspiring you with trend and competitor research, custom generated posts, and more. With everything from industry and competitor research to hashtag tracking and more, we help you leverage what’s trending to boost engagement over time.
section_2_step_3_summary: Brandwatch’s collaboration tools are nothing to scoff at; but Synup Social takes approval workflows and post creation collaboration to the next level. With Synup Social, clients can view analytics, approve or comment on scheduled posts, and connect their socials - all without a login. Remove friction every step of the way and get more done.
section_2_slider_4_summary: Brandwatch and Synup Social are both built with agencies and multi-location businesses in mind, but Synup Social takes it to the next level. With shareable links that empower your clients to view post-by-post analytics, comment on your content calendar, approve posts, and even connect their social accounts to the platform, you’ll be ditching your spreadsheets and building a more efficient workflow in no time.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over Brandwatch?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: Ready to level up? Synup Social saves you time and money by inspiring your team and building better workflows. From post-creation and trend research to analytics, Synup Social is the perfect choice for SMBs and agencies alike! With features like a collaborative approval workflow, AI-powered post ideas and shareable, white-labeled analytics and post calendars, there’s no doubt about it: Synup Social is the invaluable tool your team needs to succeed!
